hero.subtitle: Turn your voice into professional text with AI.
hero.subtitleEnd: than typing. Filler words removed, punctuation added, adapts to your style.

features.description: VoiceFlow doesn't just convert speech to text. It edits, formats, and pastes your text exactly where you want it.

aiEdit.title: AI Auto-Editing
aiEdit.subtitle: Speak, AI corrects
aiEdit.description: VoiceFlow automatically removes filler words like "um", "uh", "like". Punctuation, capitalization, grammar — all handled by AI.
aiEdit.before: um so basically I think we should uh move the meeting to next Tuesday
aiEdit.after: I think we should move the meeting to next Tuesday.

everywhere.title: Works Everywhere
everywhere.subtitle: In all apps
everywhere.description: Gmail, Slack, Word, VS Code, WhatsApp, ChatGPT... Press Ctrl+Space in any text field and speak. No setup needed.

speed.title: Instant Transcription
speed.subtitle: Groq Whisper AI
speed.description: With Groq's ultra-fast Whisper Large v3 model, your speech becomes text in seconds. Average response time 0.5 seconds.

commandMode.title: Command Mode
commandMode.subtitle: Voice commands
commandMode.description: Transform your text instantly with voice commands like "Make it formal", "Translate to English", "Shorten". AI understands and applies.

multiLang.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLang.subtitle: 12+ languages, zero setup
multiLang.description: Turkish, English, German, French, Spanish, Japanese and more. Just select a language in settings to switch.

privacy.title: Privacy-First
privacy.subtitle: Your data stays with you
privacy.description: Audio recordings are only used for transcription and never stored. Your API key is encrypted on your device. No server-side storage.

autoPaste.title: Auto-Paste
autoPaste.subtitle: No Ctrl+V needed
autoPaste.description: When transcription is complete, text is automatically copied to clipboard and pasted into the active text field. Double-click to paste too.

snippets.title: Snippet Library
snippets.subtitle: Ready templates
snippets.description: Save your frequently used phrases, email templates, and signatures. Call by voice, paste instantly. No more repetitive typing.
snippets.emailCloseText: Best regards, have a great day.

howItWorks.subtitle: Setup takes 30 seconds. Then use it everywhere.
howItWorks.step1Desc: In any app, in any text field. Works with Windows app or Chrome Extension.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Say your thoughts freely. Filler words like "um", "uh", "like" are no problem — AI cleans them all.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Groq Whisper AI converts your speech to text instantly. Punctuation, capitalization, grammar — all automatic.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Clean text is automatically copied to clipboard and pasted into the active text field. No Ctrl+V needed.

speedComparison.subtitle: Voice is 4x faster than typing. Don't slow down your ideas.

useCases.subtitle: Whether you code, create content, or sell — VoiceFlow adapts to your workflow.

developers.label: Developers
developers.title: Code faster with your voice
developers.description: Dictate code comments, documentation, commit messages, and even pseudocode. VoiceFlow understands technical jargon and formats perfectly.

students.label: Students
students.title: Write assignments at the speed of thought
students.description: Turn lecture notes, ideas, and study notes into polished text instantly. Academic formatting included.

creators.label: Content Creators
creators.title: Capture ideas before they vanish
creators.description: Blog posts, scripts, social media content — say what's on your mind, AI fixes it. Don't sacrifice ideas to slow typing.

sales.label: Sales
sales.title: Respond to clients in seconds
sales.description: Personalized follow-ups, CRM notes, and proposals — all by voice. You've already replied while competitors are still typing.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.title: Type without a keyboard
accessibility.description: For those with RSI, motor disabilities, or typing difficulties. VoiceFlow enables fully keyboard-free computer use across all apps.

lawyers.label: Lawyers
lawyers.title: Prepare legal documents effortlessly
lawyers.description: Dictate contracts, petitions, and case notes with precision. VoiceFlow learns legal terminology.

support.label: Support
support.title: Resolve tickets at light speed
support.description: Customer responses, internal notes, and escalation summaries by voice. Resolve 2x more tickets with the same team.

leaders.label: Executives
leaders.title: Manage from anywhere
leaders.description: Slack messages, emails, and meeting notes — all hands-free. Perfect for leaders on the move.

comparison.subtitle: Same job, half the price, faster and more secure.

integrations.subtitle: VoiceFlow works in every text field across 30+ of your favorite apps. No plugins, no setup — just speak.
integrations.andMore: And every app with a text field

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: VoiceFlow values the privacy of its users. This policy explains what data is collected, how it is used, and how it is protected.
privacy.s2Item2: Voice data: Used only for speech-to-text conversion, not stored on servers
privacy.s3Text: Collected data is used solely to improve service quality, enhance user experience, and resolve technical issues. Your data is not shared with or sold to third parties.
privacy.s4Text: Your voice recordings are processed only during the speech-to-text conversion. After processing is complete, voice data is automatically deleted. No voice recordings are stored on our servers.
privacy.s5Text: Your data is transmitted over encrypted connections (SSL/TLS) and stored on secure servers. Access is controlled through authorization.
privacy.s6Text: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:
privacy.s6Item1: Learn whether your personal data is being processed
privacy.s6Item2: Request information about processed personal data
privacy.s6Item3: Learn the purpose of processing and whether data is used accordingly
privacy.s6Item4: Request correction or deletion of your personal data
privacy.s6Item5: Permanently delete your account and all associated data (right to erasure)
privacy.s7Text: VoiceFlow uses cookies for essential functions such as session management and language preference. Analytics cookies are only activated with your consent.
privacy.s8Text: For questions about our privacy policy, please contact us at info@voiceflow.app.

notifications.promptText: Allow notifications for important updates and reminders.
